description_long: This is a rugged, single-bladed axe featuring a broad, dark metal head with a slightly curved cutting edge and a flat poll. The blade appears heavily worn, with a matte, textured finish suggesting frequent use. The handle is made of wood, wrapped in a dark, grippy material for enhanced grip and comfort, and shows a natural, slightly curved form. The wood grain is visible beneath the wrapping, and the handle tapers slightly towards the end. The blade is mounted using a traditional wedged style, with the head securely fitted onto the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the axe.
description: A robust, single-bladed axe with a worn, dark metal head and a wood handle wrapped in dark grip material. The axe has a slightly curved handle and a broad, matte-finished blade.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the pointed end of the blade and the wrapped handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the broad, dark blade and the full length of the wrapped wooden handle.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the handle and the poll of the axe head, with the grip wrapping visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the blade's curvature and the handle's ergonomic wrapping.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden handle, slightly curved, wrapped in dark material for grip, oval cross-section, ergonomic and robust.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved cutting edge, flat poll, matte and worn finish, no beard, utilitarian design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head fitted onto the wooden handle.
